category_sources: source_facts.description says it interprets and imports FreeHand documents; Document Foundation DLP libraries page lists libfreehand as an import library for Aldus/Macromedia/Adobe FreeHand.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is libfreehand; Document Foundation DLP page and LibreOffice repository use libfreehand.
docs_sources: Official Document Foundation wiki page is the project homepage; official LibreOffice repository provides README and docs directory.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official LibreOffice GitHub organization lists LibreOffice/libfreehand as a public repository, though the page marks it a read-only mirror.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and Document Foundation DLP libraries page identify Adobe/Macromedia FreeHand import support for document liberation workflows.
